# Raw Extraction

```markdown
#### _Division B 8.4.4.21._
|Col1|Table 8.4.4.21.-A Heating Equipment Part-Load Performance Characteristics Forming Part of Sentences 8.4.4.9.(8) and 8.4.4.21.(1)|
|---|---|
|_Boiler_ Part-Load<br>Performance Curve(s)|The fuel consumption at part-load conditions, derived by applying an adjustment factor to the fuel consumption at design<br>conditions, shall be calculated using the following equation. Condensing and non-condensing_ boiler_ curves fit the quadratic<br>equation of FHeatPLC defined therein. For modulating_ boilers_, values for Qpartload/Qdesign and corresponding values for<br>FHeatPLC shall be those listed in the last row of this Table.<br>(1)<br>where<br>Fuelpartload = fuel consumption at part-load conditions, in Btu/h,<br>Fueldesign = fuel consumption at design conditions, in Btu/h, and<br>FHeatPLC = fuel heating part-load efficiency curve determined<br>using Equation (2) or values from the last row of<br>this Table, as applicable.<br>(2)<br>where<br>Qpartload =_ boiler_ capacity at part-load conditions, in Btu/h, or<br>values from the last row of this Table, as applicable,<br>Qdesign =_ boiler_ capacity at design conditions, in Btu/h, or<br>values from the last row of this Table, as applicable,<br>and<br>a, b, c = applicable values as follows:<br>Variable<br>a<br>b<br>c<br>Condensing<br>_Boiler_<br>0.00533<br>0.904<br>0.09066<br>Non-condensing<br>_Boiler_<br>0.082597<br>0.996764<br>–0.079361|
|_Furnace_ Part-Load<br>Performance Curve(s)|The fuel consumption at part-load conditions, derived by applying an adjustment factor to the fuel consumption at rated<br>conditions, shall be calculated using the following equation. Condensing and atmospheric_ furnace_ curves fit the quadratic<br>equation of FHeatPLC defined therein. For modulating_ furnaces_, values for Qpartload/Qrated and corresponding values for<br>FHeatPLC shall be those listed in the last row of this Table.<br>(3)<br>where<br>Fuelpartload = fuel consumption at part-load conditions, in Btu/h,<br>Fuelrated = fuel consumption at rated conditions, in Btu/h, and<br>FHeatPLC = fuel heating part-load efficiency curve determined<br>using Equation (4) or values from the last row of<br>this Table, as applicable.<br>(4)<br>where<br>Qpartload =_ furnace_ capacity at part-load conditions, in Btu/h, or<br>values from the last row of this Table, as applicable,<br>Qrated =_ furnace_ capacity at rated conditions, in Btu/h, or<br>values from the last row of this Table, as applicable,<br>and<br>a, b, c = applicable values as follows:<br>Variable<br>a<br>b<br>c<br>Condensing<br>_Furnace_<br>0.00533<br>0.904<br>0.09066<br>Atmospheric<br>_Furnace_<br>0.0186100<br>1.0942090<br>–0.1128190|
```
